CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Ofmotion And Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kimberly A. Bliss, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for terminating and monetary sanctions denied in part, granted in part:
a. Motion for terminating sanction denied without prejudice;
b. In lieu of terminating sanctions, the court issues issue and evidentiary sanctions as follows: (i) plaintiff shall be precluded at trial from offering any evidence or testimony concerning any injuries allegedly sustained in the subject incident; (ii) plaintiff shall be precluded at trial from offering any evidence or testimony concerning any past, present or future medical treatment, or any costs of treatment concerning any injuries allegedly sustained in the subject incident;
c. Monetary sanctions shall issue in the sum of $1,500.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to file Proof of Service of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered off calendar and dissolved/compliance. Proceedings not reported (212)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-30-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kimberly A. Bliss, Esq., for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination; And For Monetary Sanctions.
1. Motion to compel independent medical examination granted; plaintiff shall appear for an independent medical examination on July 2, 2009 with Dr. Darrell Hayes at 400 30th Street, Oakland, California [510.834.5484], at a time to be designated by counsel;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390;
3. If plaintiff fails to appear for independent medical examination in compliance with this order, defendant may seek further sanctions, including evidentiary or issue sanctions. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Ashwin Ladva, Esq. of Ladva, Shoker & Associates Motion to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF THOMAS TUNE. Appearances: Jason Lundberg, Esq. of Ladva Law Firm (415) 296-8844, appearing and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
